recent_form_summary: Heartbreaking 5-set, 4h41m loss to Mensik at the French Open after opening with a clean win over Brooksby; also reached the Geneva final on clay. 21-13 in 2026, all on clay.
stat_trend_summary: Averaged roughly 3.4 aces/match in his most recent reported comparison; this is his first competitive grass match of 2026, so there is zero surface-specific data.
opponent_factor_summary: Sonego is solid on grass (53.8% career win rate there) but not an elite returner; trails the H2H 0-2 (0-1 on grass, on hard court in Miami).
injury_news: None found; just fatigue from a long clay campaign and a grueling 5-setter before transitioning to grass.
notes: A clay-court grinder with a low ace rate making his first grass match of the season a major unknown -- grass typically boosts ace counts, but there is zero direct precedent for this player specifically.
